base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_cast_roll_ending — a ui (menu_screen) from 1990 super mario world. End-credits cast roll — each enemy-class named in credits-style scroll. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
